intended_use: SubtlePET is an image processing software intended for use by radiologists and nuclear medicine physicians for transfer, storage, and noise reduction of fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) and amyloid PET images
intended_use_full: SubtlePET is an image processing software intended for use by radiologists and nuclear medicine physicians for transfer, storage, and noise reduction of fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) and amyloid PET images (including PET/CT and PET/MRI).
other_metrics: Significant average increase in quantitative metrics for all cases demonstrating noise reduction in PET scans
